modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need link for Diversity Dialogue event recording

full_description_text:  
I'm looking for the link to the Diversity Dialogue from 9/23/2019. Also, where can I find the recording for the Free Speech and Intellectual Diversity Forum? I can't seem to locate it anywhere.
short_description: Need link for Diversity Dialogue event recording
description: I'm looking for the link to the Diversity Dialogue from 9/23/2019. Also, where can I find the recording for the Free Speech and Intellectual Diversity Forum? I can't seem to locate it anywhere.
